session.user:
Run prettier (via the devrun pattern — use Bash to run the tool directly since we're checking formatting) on the changed markdown files. First run `git diff --name-only HEAD~2` to see all changed files, then run `prettier --check` on just the .md files that were changed. Report the results — do NOT fix anything.
Working directory: /home/runner/work/erk/erk
session.assistant: I'll run prettier to check the formatting of changed markdown files. Let me start by finding the changed files from the last 2 commits.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Show all files changed in last 2 commits

session.assistant: Now let me extract just the .md files and run prettier check on them:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: git diff --name-only HEAD~2 | grep '\.md$' | xargs prettier --check
Check prettier formatting on all changed .md files

session.tool_result:
Exit code 123 [[33mwarn[39m] .claude/commands/erk/replan.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/architecture/ref-json-migration.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/architecture/session-discovery.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/architecture/session-storage-revert-rationale.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/planning/plan-backend-migration.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/planning/plan-id-semantics.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/sessions/lifecycle.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 7 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix.
Checking formatting...
session.assistant:
prettier failed: 7 files have formatting issues
**Files with formatting violations:**
1. .claude/commands/erk/replan.md 2. docs/learned/architecture/ref-json-migration.md 3. docs/learned/architecture/session-discovery.md 4. docs/learned/architecture/session-storage-revert-rationale.md 5. docs/learned/planning/plan-backend-migration.md 6. docs/learned/planning/plan-id-semantics.md 7. docs/learned/sessions/lifecycle.md
These files need prettier formatting. Run with `prettier --write` to fix them.
